table.name: (P0016) Crankshaft/Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 1 Sensor A)
table.description: Crankshaft/Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 1 Sensor A). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0018) Crankshaft/Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 2 Sensor A)
table.description: Crankshaft/Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 2 Sensor A). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0030) HO2S Heater Control Circuit (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
table.description: HO2S Heater Control Circuit (Bank 1 Sensor 1). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0134) O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Bank 1 Sensor 1)
table.description: O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Bank 1 Sensor 1). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0222) Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit Low
table.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit Low. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0223) Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit High
table.description: Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch "B" Circuit High. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0410) Secondary Air Injection System
table.description: Secondary Air Injection System. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.description: Vehicle Speed Sensor "A". To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.description: Vehicle Speed Sensor Intermittent/Erratic/High. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0600) Serial Communication Link
table.description: Serial Communication Link. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0605) Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error
table.description: Internal Control Module Read Only Memory (ROM) Error. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.name: (P0607) Control Module Performance
table.description: Control Module Performance. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.description: Throttle Actuator Control Range/Performance (Bank 1). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.description: Transmission Control System (MIL Request). To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.

table.description: Return Spring Failure. To disable this DTC, make sure the box above is unchecked. Off-road use only.
